Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" frameborder="0" style="z-index: -1; position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; opacity: 0;" tabindex="-1"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-label="learn more about cookies" class="cc-link" href="/personvern" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" role="button" tabindex="0" target="_self">Mer informasjon</a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Ingen stillinger er ledig for øyeblikket. - Romsdalsmuseet

https://www.romsdalsmuseet.no/stilling_ledig
Avvik: 281 | Bestått: 325
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/mail-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/link-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/fb-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 class="toppsubtitle"></h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Fyll inn i søknaden</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5>Romsdalsmuseet</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'cntnt01fbrp__171[]' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="cms_checkbox" id="soknad_0" name="cntnt01fbrp__171[]" type="checkbox" value="1"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (17 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mm-listitem__text" href="http://www.romsdalsmuseet.tv/" target="_blank"><span>Romsdalsmuseet TV</span></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Noregs dokumentarv - Romsdalsmuseet

https://www.romsdalsmuseet.no/no/kunnskap/samlinger/noregs-dokumentarv
Avvik: 283 | Bestått: 318
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/mail-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/link-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/fb-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 class="toppsubtitle"></h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5>Romsdalsmuseet</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

Vil du være hjelper med strikkeopplæring for 4.klassinger? - Romsdalsmuseet

https://www.romsdalsmuseet.no/event/vil-du-v%C3%A6re-hjelper-med-strikkeoppl%C3%A6ring-for-4.klassinger_5/64
Avvik: 272 | Bestått: 312
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://www.romsdalsmuseet.no/uploads/_CGSmartImage/img-f25700af92a8c95b466456ba689f0594" srcset="https://www.romsdalsmuseet.no/uploads/_CGSmartImage/img-f25700af92a8c95b466456ba689f0594 1x,
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/mail-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/link-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/fb-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="" srcset=" 1x, 2x"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://www.romsdalsmuseet.no/uploads/_CGSmartImage/img-a5b39bfcd8c808d6e252d73b2e89c20e" srcset="https://www.romsdalsmuseet.no/uploads/_CGSmartImage/img-a5b39bfcd8c808d6e252d73b2e89c20e 1x,
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 class="toppsubtitle"></h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>Romsdalsmuseet</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

Forespørsel om leie av lokale - Romsdalsmuseet

https://www.romsdalsmuseet.no/no/utleie/utleie-av-hus-og-omrader/foresporsel-leie
Avvik: 274 | Bestått: 339
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/mail-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/link-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/fb-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 class="toppsubtitle"></h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>Romsdalsmuseet</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="mm-listitem__text" href="http://www.romsdalsmuseet.tv/" target="_blank"><span>Romsdalsmuseet TV</span></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://www.romsdalsmuseet.tv/" target="_blank"><span class="title">Romsdalsmuseet TV</span></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="social-link" href="javascript:;" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText(window.location.href);" title="Kopier lenke"><img src="/uploads/design/link-logo.svg"/></a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="social-fb" href="https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://www.romsdalsmuseet.no/no/utleie/utleie-av-hus-og-omrader/foresporsel-leie&src=sdkpreparse" target="_blank" title="De
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="cms_dropdown" data-cgbf-required="" id="fra_min" name="fra_min"><option value="00">00</option><option value="15">15</option><option value="30">30</option><option value="45">45</option><
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="cms_dropdown" data-cgbf-required="" id="til_min" name="til_min"><option value="00">00</option><option value="15">15</option><option value="30">30</option><option value="45">45</option><
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input name="__hpname" style="display: none;" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'fakt_postnr' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="fakt_postnr" maxlength="80" name="fakt_postnr" size="25" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='postal-code' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field '__hpname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="__hpname" style="display: none;" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-label="learn more about cookies" class="cc-link" href="/personvern" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" role="button" tabindex="0" target="_self">Mer informasjon</a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Våre samarbeidspartnere - Romsdalsmuseet

https://www.romsdalsmuseet.no/no/omoss/samarbeidspartnere
Avvik: 283 | Bestått: 315
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/mail-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/link-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/fb-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 class="toppsubtitle"></h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed

SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="tittel ingress"><img alt="" height="61" src="uploads/01_Istad_logo_kraft-bla.png" width="303"/></h3>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>Romsdalsmuseet</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (20 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Andre verdenskrig - Romsdalsmuseet

https://www.romsdalsmuseet.no/no/besok-oss/lovikremma/annen-verdenskrig
Avvik: 269 | Bestått: 311
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/mail-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/link-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/uploads/design/fb-logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 class="toppsubtitle"></h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5>Romsdalsmuseet</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

<a class="social-link" href="javascript:;" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText(window.location.href);" title="Kopier lenke"><img src="/uploads/design/link-logo.svg"/></a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="social-fb" href="https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://www.romsdalsmuseet.no/no/besok-oss/lovikremma/annen-verdenskrig&src=sdkpreparse" target="_blank" title="Del på Faceb
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" frameborder="0" style="z-index: -1; position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; opacity: 0;" tabindex="-1"></iframe>

python checker.py https://www.romsdalsmuseet.no --max-pages 16 --format html
